description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named p4c-lint that runs on push to main, pull requests to main, and merge groups for main. The workflow should cancel any in-progress runs for the same pull request or reference, except for the main branch. Use an ubuntu-24.04 job with Python setup, recursive submodule checkout, and ccache. Run a series of build and linting steps including cpplint, clang-format, black, and isort on C/C++ and Python files.
